challenges.analysis: Article 10 states '同一发票最多报销1次' with no stated exceptions. Even if special_approval could exempt, all 12 records have special_approval=0. No exemption applicable.
Each duplicate pair involves the same employee, same department, same amount. The second record (R004201-R004206) each has reason prefixed '重复发票注入样本:', confirming intent.
2025 policy effective from 2025-01-01 per Article 14. All records fall within 2025. No version ambiguity.
All 12 records are 'approved' status. None are cancelled, reversed, or voided. Records are active.
Each pair has identical amounts. Expense dates differ between original and duplicate. No boundary issues.

supporting_evidence: Article 10 is absolute with no exemption clause
rationale: Article 10 is absolute: same invoice reimbursed at most once. All 6 duplicate pairs have special_approval=0. No boundary, version, or exemption issues. All findings confirmed.
